heading: Page residence hall and page meal plan
label: 4917 Page residence hall and page meal plan
notes: References in TextThe Ninety-eighth Congress, referred to in subsec. (a), convened on .Jan. 3, 1983

children.heading: Revolving fund; establishment within House contingent fund
children.label: a Revolving fund; establishment within House contingent fund
children.text: Effective at the beginning of the Ninety-eighth Congress and until otherwise provided by law, there is established a revolving fund within the contingent fund of the House of Representatives for the page residence hall and the page meal plan.

children.heading: Deposits in revolving fund; disbursements by Chief Administrative Officer of House
children.label: b Deposits in revolving fund; disbursements by Chief Administrative Officer of House
children.text: There shall be deposited in the revolving fund such amounts as may be received by the Chief Administrative Officer of the House of Representatives with respect to lodging, meals, and related services furnished for congressional pages. Amounts so deposited shall be available for disbursement by the Chief Administrative Officer of the House of Representatives, as determined by the Clerk of the House of Representatives, for expenses relating to the page residence hall and the page meal plan.

children.heading: Regulations
children.label: c Regulations
children.text: The House of Representatives Page Board shall prescribe such regulations as may be necessary to carry out this section.
